  • weekly picks (Jul 1 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 July 1st week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    07/10

    1. s41467-026-75353-6 High temperature Nb-Si alloys using data science: optimization of fracture toughness and high-temperature strength (Nature Communications)

    2. s41567-026-03316-1 Emergence of Fermi’s golden rule in a quantum many-body system (Nature Physics)

    3. s41567-026-03370-9 Principles of optics in Fock space for the scalable manipulation of large quantum states (Nature Physics)

    4. d9jf-gxk5 Thick Lunar Crust Amplifies Deci-Hertz Gravitational-Wave Signals (PRL)

    5. 3tcp-hqf9 Gravitational-Wave Tomography of the Moon: Constraining Lunar Structure with Calibrated Gravitational Waves (PRL)

    6. bjxb-8tsk Physics-inspired transformer quantum states via latent imaginary-time evolution (PRR)

    7. hfjf-7xzr Particle-hole origin of thermal beating in dipole-compression modes of a one-dimensional Bose gas (PRRL)
